    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " FROM python:3.12-slim AS base\r\n \r\n ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \\\r\n     PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \\\r\n     PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=off \\\r\n     PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=on \\\r\n     PIP_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT=100\r\n \r\n WORKDIR /app\r\n \r\n RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \\\r\n     build-essential \\\r\n     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*\r\n \r\n COPY pyproject.toml README.md ./\r\n COPY src ./src\r\n COPY config ./config\r\n \r\n RUN pip install --upgrade pip && \\\r\n     pip install . && \\\r\n     pip cache purge\r\n \r\n ENV MINIQUEUE_DB_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED \\\r\n     MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0\r\n \r\n RUN mkdir -p /app/data\r\n \r\n EXPOSE 8000\r\n \r\n CMD [\"uvicorn\", \"miniqueue.api_app:create_app\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8000\"]\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "e17cee92c906ab0dc5dd52c904b8c579a0582cf0ed170c9f4dc04bc236d63a8f",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " [build-system]\r\n requires = [\"setuptools>=65\", \"wheel\"]\r\n build-backend = \"setuptools.build_meta\"\r\n\r\n [project]\r\n name = \"miniqueue\"\r\n version = \"0.1.0\"\r\n description = \"Local, production-style job queue and scheduler (mini Celery)\"\r\n readme = \"README.md\"\r\n requires-python = \">=3.12\"\r\n authors = [{ name = \"MiniQueue System\", email = \"REDACTED\" }]\r\n license = { text = \"MIT\" }\r\n classifiers = [\r\n   \"Programming Language :: Python :: 3\",\r\n   \"Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12\",\r\n   \"License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License\",\r\n   \"Operating System :: OS Independent\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n dependencies = [\r\n   \"fastapi>=0.115.0\",\r\n   \"uvicorn[standard]>=0.30.0\",\r\n   \"redis>=5.0.0\",\r\n   \"sqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"aiosqlite>=0.19.0\",\r\n   \"pydantic>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"pydantic-settings>=2.0.0\",\r\n   \"typer[all]>=0.12.0\",\r\n   \"httpx>=0.27.0\",\r\n   \"prometheus-client>=0.20.0\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n [project.optional-dependencies]\r\n dev = [\r\n   \"pytest>=8.0.0\",\r\n   \"pytest-asyncio>=0.23.0\",\r\n   \"ruff>=0.4.0\",\r\n   \"mypy>=1.10.0\",\r\n   \"types-redis>=4.6.0.20240425\",\r\n]\r\n\r\n [project.scripts]\r\n miniqueue = \"miniqueue.cli:app\"\r\n\r\n [tool.setuptools]\r\n package-dir = { \"\" = \"src\" }\r\n\r\n [tool.setuptools.packages.find]\r\n where = [\"src\"]\r\n\r\n [tool.ruff]\r\n line-length = 100\r\n target-version = \"py312\"\r\n select = [\"E\", \"F\", \"I\", \"B\"]\r\n ignore = [\"E501\"]\r\n\r\n [tool.mypy]\r\n python_version = \"3.12\"\r\n strict = false\r\n disallow_untyped_defs = true\r\n disallow_incomplete_defs = true\r\n check_untyped_defs = true\r\n no_implicit_optional = true\r\n warn_unused_ignores = true\r\n warn_redundant_casts = true\r\n warn_unused_configs = true\r\n pretty = true\r\n\r\n [tool.pytest.ini_options]\r\n asyncio_mode = \"auto\"\r\n testpaths = [\"tests\"]\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f6ce088c647049c2c08866aea3ac4766ebd09b29d4e4b1791d24346f8e28d882",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
